assets.title: Underroot Corridor
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 392x220. Strong depth read; possible pseudo-glyphs on side stones need human review before approval.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft previewed in Visual Gallery. Keep for art-direction review; do not approve until pseudo-glyph risk is checked.

assets.title: Underroot Combat
assets.reviewFocus: enemy contrast, floor contact, no text
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 392x220. Good enemy stage and floor contact read.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft previewed in Visual Gallery. Strongest first background candidate; ready for approval review after final no-text pass.

assets.title: Rootbitten Wolf
assets.cropNotes: Downsampled to 96x128. Silhouette is strong; future matte pass must separate near-black background cleanly.
assets.matteOrMaskNotes: Near-black matte removed with threshold 18 into a transparent 96x128 preview. Edge cleanup still needs human review before approval.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft matted and previewed in Visual Gallery. Strong silhouette; not approved until edge cleanup and combat-background composition pass.

assets.title: Blood Edge
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped and downsampled to 64x48. Blade reads at tiny size; abstract wall marks must be checked for accidental text.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft previewed in Visual Gallery. Tiny crop reads; do not approve until accidental wall-glyph review is complete.

assets.title: UI Ornaments
assets.reviewFocus: panel corners, status frames, palette restraint
assets.cropNotes: Center-cropped to 1024x1024 for preview. Source is strong but landscape; final UI slicing should return to raw source or request square composition.
assets.humanEditNotes: Batch 01 draft reviewed in Visual Gallery. Strong motifs but wrong sheet composition for approval.
assets.rejectionNotes: Rejected for approval: landscape source loses too many elements in square preview. Rerun with strict square-sheet composition or slice deliberately from raw source.
